_comment: Reference declarative-agent manifest skeleton for a Microsoft 365 Copilot agent that wires Loom as an MCP action. Use this as a starting point in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit (VS Code extension) when scaffolding an agent with 'Start with an MCP server'. Replace the MCP URL and the agent name/description, then deploy via the Toolkit. The Loom server hardcodes ingestion_mode=live_mcp_capture on every loom_learn call from this transport.
name: Loom Memory
description: Evidence-grounded memory for this tenant. Calls loom_think for context, loom_learn for verbatim capture, loom_recall for direct entity lookup.
instructions: See templates/m365_copilot_instructions.md — paste the full block into this field. The verbatim-content discipline is load-bearing.
